creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Contentless bug report, please send a description of what 
you're trying to do along with the EXACT WORDING of any error 
messages to current@freebsd.org. 

In the future, you might want to reconsider what you think 
is "critical severity" and "high priority" as well.
